mapper.select: /* 알림: 목록 조회 (한글명 조인, 최신순 100건) */ SELECT N.NTF_SN AS ntfSn, N.USR_SN AS usrSn, N.NTF_TYPE_CD AS ntfTypeCd, T.CMM_NM AS typeNm, N.NTF_DOMAIN_CD AS ntfDomainCd, D.CMM_NM AS domainNm, N.NTF_AUDIENCE_CD AS ntfAudienceCd, N.NTF_TTL AS ntfTtl, N.NTF_CN AS ntfCn, N.NTF_REF_TYPE_CD AS ntfRefTypeCd, N.NTF_REF_SN AS ntfRefSn, N.NTF_READ_YN AS ntfReadYn, N.NTF_READ_DT AS ntfReadDt, N.NTF_EMAIL_STATUS_CD AS ntfEmailStatusCd, N.NTF_REG_DT AS ntfRegDt FROM NOTIFICATION N LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE T ON T.CMM_CD = N.NTF_TYPE_CD LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE D ON D.CMM_CD = N.NTF_DOMAIN_CD WHERE N.USR_SN = #{usrSn} ORDER BY N.NTF_SN DESC LIMIT 100
